basics.name: Jagriti Singh
basics.title: Product Designer | UI/UX | Experience Strategy
basics.summary: I am a Product Designer (UI/UX) who builds through the lens of Engineering Precision. My background in Mechanical Engineering taught me one thing: Great design isn't just about how it looks, it's about how it works—with zero failure and maximum efficiency. Currently, I am driving product experience and growth initiatives at IIT Delhi, IIT Bombay, and HCL GUVI.
highlights: Strategic Product Design: Expertise in Figma and end-to-end prototyping, focusing on scalable design systems and high-fidelity user journeys.

Quality-First Logic: I apply Total Quality Management (TQM) and Root Cause Analysis (RCA) principles to digital products. My goal is to reduce 'user friction' the same way an engineer reduces 'mechanical friction'—through meticulous auditing and data-driven iteration.
Execution Excellence: From orchestrating workflows for 2,000+ participants to ensuring 100% accuracy in project deliverables, I thrive in high-stakes technical ecosystems.

experience.role: Product Experience & Outreach Intern | IIT Delhi (Tryst'26)
bullets: Strategic Growth & User Acquisition: Spearheaded outreach initiatives to expand the digital footprint of Tryst, IIT Delhi, driving significant user engagement and brand awareness across regional networks.
Regional Leadership: Secured District Rank 1 among a competitive pool of ambassadors by consistently delivering high-impact results and optimizing outreach strategies.
Performance Excellence: Achieved a top-tier performance milestone of 10,018 credits, demonstrating exceptional dedication to project goals and community scaling.
Market Penetration: Acted as a key liaison between the IIT Delhi organizing committee and the student community, facilitating seamless communication and enhancing product visibility.

Stakeholder Engagement: Leveraged networking and interpersonal skills to cultivate a robust community of tech enthusiasts, ensuring a high conversion rate for event registrations and platform interactions.

User-Centric Interface Design: Conceptualized and designed intuitive user interfaces (UI) and seamless user experiences (UX) for digital products, ensuring a balance between aesthetics and functionality.
Wireframing & Prototyping: Developed high-fidelity wireframes and interactive prototypes to visualize user journeys, improving the design-to-development handoff process.
UX Research & Analysis: Conducted thorough user research and usability testing to identify pain points, translating complex user requirements into elegant design solutions.
Design Systems: Established and maintained consistent design systems and component libraries to ensure brand visual identity across multiple platforms.
Cross-functional Collaboration: Collaborated closely with product managers and developers to iterate on designs based on technical feasibility and business objectives.
Design System Architecture: Spearheaded the development and maintenance of comprehensive, scalable design systems and centralized Figma libraries to ensure cross-platform visual consistency.
Component Engineering: Engineered a robust library of reusable UI components with advanced properties and variants, significantly reducing design debt and accelerating the prototyping phase.
Scalability and Standardization: Established standardized design tokens and documentation frameworks, enabling seamless synchronization between design assets and front-end development.
Workflow Optimization: Optimized team collaboration workflows by implementing version control and systematic updates within Figma, improving overall design-to-production efficiency.
Strategic Technical Oversight: Provided architectural guidance to ensure that design solutions were technically feasible and aligned with the long-term product roadmap and user experience goals.
High-Fidelity Interface Development: Specialized in creating visually compelling and pixel-perfect digital interfaces, focusing on aesthetic consistency and brand alignment.
Responsive Design Optimization: Engineered adaptive layouts across diverse screen resolutions to ensure a cohesive user experience on mobile, web, and desktop platforms.
Interactive Element Design: Developed micro-interactions and dynamic UI elements to enhance user engagement and provide intuitive navigation flows.
Collaborative Prototyping: Worked in synergy with development teams to transform static designs into functional assets, ensuring high technical accuracy during implementation.
Executed end-to-end design for Healthcare Dashboards and Task Management Apps.
Developed responsive high-fidelity wireframes and interactive prototypes in Figma and Adobe XD.
Conducted usability testing to identify friction points, significantly improving platform navigation.
Managed Design-to-Code handoff with developers to ensure consistency with established Design Systems.
Visual Identity Development: Crafted cohesive visual languages and color palettes to strengthen brand recognition across all digital touchpoints.
Micro-interaction Design: Engineered subtle animations and interactive transitions to provide real-time feedback and enhance user satisfaction.
Asset Optimization: Managed the export and preparation of high-quality graphics and SVG assets, ensuring optimal performance and loading speeds.
Interface Iteration: Refined layout structures based on user feedback loops to improve navigation clarity and overall aesthetic appeal.
Operational Reporting & Analysis: Structured and maintained comprehensive HR reports to track key workforce metrics, ensuring data accuracy for management review.
Documentation & Compliance: Managed the lifecycle of employee records and sensitive documentation, upholding strict standards of organizational confidentiality.
Administrative Lifecycle Support: Streamlined internal reporting workflows to assist in the seamless execution of HR operations and employee engagement initiatives.
Data-Driven Coordination: Collaborated on the synthesis of departmental data to provide actionable insights for internal audits and performance tracking.
End-to-End User Journey Mapping: Designed comprehensive user flows and site maps to streamline navigation and enhance the overall digital experience.
Inclusive Design Implementation: Prioritized accessibility standards (WCAG) to create inclusive interfaces that cater to diverse user needs and abilities.
Visual Hierarchy Optimization: Leveraged typography, spatial grids, and color theory to establish a clear visual hierarchy, guiding users toward key call-to-action (CTA) elements.
Rapid Prototyping & Iteration: Produced quick-turnaround interactive mockups to validate design concepts and incorporate stakeholder feedback in real-time.
Design-to-Code Integration: Specialized in translating complex UI mockups and interactive prototypes into high-fidelity, production-ready front-end components.
Component-Driven Development: Engineered modular and reusable interface elements, ensuring consistent behavior and styling across various web and mobile frameworks.
Technical Feasibility Consulting: Acted as a liaison between design and engineering teams to validate the technical viability of design concepts before the development phase.
Data Synthesis & Pre-processing: Assisted in the curation and structuring of large datasets, ensuring high-quality input for machine learning model validation.
AI Research & Benchmarking: Conducted comparative analysis of emerging AI tools and frameworks to support internal feasibility studies and technical documentation.
Model Testing Support: Participated in the iterative testing of automated workflows, identifying edge cases to improve the accuracy and reliability of AI-driven solutions.
Prompt Engineering & Optimization: Leveraged advanced prompting techniques to refine the outputs of Large Language Models (LLMs) for specific business use cases.
Backend Logic Development: Engineered clean and efficient Python scripts to automate complex workflows and improve data processing speed.
Bug Tracking & Debugging: Conducted rigorous code reviews and debugging sessions to enhance system stability and performance.
Algorithm Implementation: Integrated fundamental data structures and algorithms to solve logical challenges within core modules.
High-Level Design Strategy: Developed the structural framework for complex web applications, focusing on information architecture and scalability.
Design-to-Dev Synchronization: Established technical guidelines for UI implementation, ensuring 100% fidelity between design files and live code.
Standardized Layouts: Created structural templates to maintain aesthetic harmony across large-scale enterprise platforms.
Version Control Integration: Leveraged Git and GitHub for collaborative development, ensuring streamlined code merging and documentation.
Application Prototyping: Developed functional backend prototypes to validate software requirements during the initial development phase.
Environment Optimization: Configured development environments in VS Code to enhance coding efficiency and deployment cycles.
Heuristic Evaluation: Performed detailed UX audits to identify usability gaps and implemented data-driven design improvements.
User Flow Optimization: Designed logical navigation paths to minimize user friction and improve task completion rates.
Contextual Research: Conducted user-centric research to translate business goals into meaningful digital experiences.
Figma Component Management: Built interactive high-fidelity mockups using advanced Figma features like auto-layout and prototyping.
Educational Interface Design: Tailored UX solutions specifically for ed-tech platforms to improve student engagement and learning accessibility.
Iterative Design: Refined interface elements based on usability testing feedback to ensure a smooth end-user journey.
LLM Output Calibration: Developed and refined complex prompts to maximize the accuracy and relevance of AI-generated content.
Natural Language Optimization: Structured linguistic inputs to minimize biases and improve the conversational flow of AI models.
AI Workflow Efficiency: Streamlined automated content generation tasks through strategic prompt engineering techniques.
Cross-Platform Interface Strategy: Designed cohesive user interfaces for diverse digital products, focusing on seamless transitions between web and mobile environments.
Interaction Modeling: Developed interactive wireframes to map user journeys, ensuring all touchpoints align with core business objectives.
Usability Analysis: Evaluated design prototypes against user experience standards to minimize friction and enhance overall platform accessibility.

Component Optimization: Refined frontend codebases to improve page load performance and ensure cross-browser compatibility.
Collaborative Development: Partnered with senior developers to translate UI mockups into functional web assets using clean, maintainable code.
